features.name: division with zero-width operand
features.description: Code should include a division operation where one operand is a zero-width type (0 bits)

features.name: bit extraction producing zero-width result
features.description: Code should include a bit extraction operation that produces a zero-width result from a non-zero-width value

features.name: zero-width input port
features.description: Code should include an input port with zero width that feeds into an arithmetic operation
